```{r}
  target_scaled <- scale(target_mat, center = ref_mean, scale = ref_sd)
  
  return(list(
    ref = ref_scaled,
    target = target_scaled,
    center = ref_mean,
    scale = ref_sd
  ))
}


knn_expected_pgs <- function(ref_pgs, ref_pc_scaled, target_pc_scaled,
                             k = 50,
                             weighting = c("inverse_distance", "uniform"),
                             eps = 1e-8) {
  weighting <- match.arg(weighting)
  
  if (k > nrow(ref_pc_scaled)) {
    stop("k is larger than number of reference individuals.")
  }
  
  knn <- FNN::get.knnx(
    data = ref_pc_scaled,
    query = target_pc_scaled,
    k = k
  )
  
  idx <- knn$nn.index
  dist <- knn$nn.dist
  
  pgs_mat <- matrix(ref_pgs[idx], nrow = nrow(idx), ncol = ncol(idx))
  
  if (weighting == "uniform") {
    w <- matrix(1 / k, nrow = nrow(idx), ncol = k)
  } else {
    w <- 1 / (dist + eps)
    w <- w / rowSums(w)
  }
  
  mu_hat <- rowSums(pgs_mat * w)
  
  # Weighted local variance. This is useful diagnostically, but I would not
  # rely on it too heavily for the main inference.
  var_hat <- rowSums(w * sweep(pgs_mat, 1, mu_hat, "-")^2)
  sd_hat <- sqrt(var_hat)
  
  n_eff <- 1 / rowSums(w^2)
  mean_dist <- rowMeans(dist)
  min_dist <- dist[, 1]
  
  return(list(
    mu_hat = mu_hat,
    sd_hat = sd_hat,
    idx = idx,
    dist = dist,
    weights = w,
    n_eff = n_eff,
    mean_dist = mean_dist,
    min_dist = min_dist
  ))
}


linear_pc_correction <- function(ref_dt, target_dt, pc_cols) {
  form <- as.formula(
    paste("PGS ~", paste(pc_cols, collapse = " + "))
  )
  
  fit <- lm(form, data = ref_dt)
  
  target_mu <- predict(fit, newdata = target_dt)
  ref_mu <- predict(fit, newdata = ref_dt)
  
  target_resid <- target_dt$PGS - target_mu
  ref_resid <- ref_dt$PGS - ref_mu
  
  return(list(
    fit = fit,
    target_mu = target_mu,
    ref_mu = ref_mu,
    target_resid = target_resid,
    ref_resid = ref_resid
  ))
}


test_residual_pc_association <- function(dt, resid_col, pc_cols,
                                         covar_cols = NULL,
                                         label = NULL) {
  use_cols <- c(resid_col, pc_cols, covar_cols)
  tmp <- as.data.table(copy(dt))
  tmp <- tmp[complete.cases(tmp[, ..use_cols])]
  
  if (nrow(tmp) < 10) {
    return(data.table(
      label = label,
      n = nrow(tmp),
      r2 = NA_real_,
      adj_r2 = NA_real_,
      p_lrt = NA_real_
    ))
  }
  
  null_form <- as.formula(
    paste(resid_col, "~ 1")
  )
  
  full_terms <- c(pc_cols, covar_cols)
  full_form <- as.formula(
    paste(resid_col, "~", paste(full_terms, collapse = " + "))
  )
  
  fit0 <- lm(null_form, data = tmp)
  fit1 <- lm(full_form, data = tmp)
  
  a <- anova(fit0, fit1)
  
  data.table(
    label = label,
    n = nrow(tmp),
    r2 = summary(fit1)$r.squared,
    adj_r2 = summary(fit1)$adj.r.squared,
    p_lrt = a$`Pr(>F)`[2]
  )
}


reference_leave_one_out_knn_residuals <- function(ref_pgs, ref_pc_scaled,
                                                  k = 50,
                                                  weighting = c("inverse_distance", "uniform"),
                                                  eps = 1e-8) {
  weighting <- match.arg(weighting)
  
  # Query reference against itself. The first neighbour should be self, so ask
  # for k + 1 and remove the self match.
  if ((k + 1) > nrow(ref_pc_scaled)) {
    stop("k + 1 is larger than number of reference individuals.")
  }
  
  knn <- FNN::get.knnx(
    data = ref_pc_scaled,
    query = ref_pc_scaled,
    k = k + 1
  )
  
  idx <- knn$nn.index
  dist <- knn$nn.dist
  
  # Remove self neighbour. Usually column 1 is self, but remove the first
  # neighbour regardless after querying identical matrices.
  idx <- idx[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  dist <- dist[, -1, drop = FALSE]
  
  pgs_mat <- matrix(ref_pgs[idx], nrow = nrow(idx), ncol = ncol(idx))
  
  if (weighting == "uniform") {
    w <- matrix(1 / k, nrow = nrow(idx), ncol = k)
  } else {
    w <- 1 / (dist + eps)
    w <- w / rowSums(w)
  }
  
  mu_hat <- rowSums(pgs_mat * w)
  resid <- ref_pgs - mu_hat
  
  var_hat <- rowSums(w * sweep(pgs_mat, 1, mu_hat, "-")^2)
  sd_hat <- sqrt(var_hat)
  
  return(list(
    mu_hat = mu_hat,
    resid = resid,
    sd_hat = sd_hat,
    idx = idx,
    dist = dist,
    weights = w
  ))
}


reference_matched_empirical_null <- function(
    target_knn,
    ref_loo_resid,
    target_resid,
    B = 5000,
    weighted_sampling = TRUE,
    seed = 1
) {
  set.seed(seed)
  
  match_idx <- target_knn$idx
  match_w <- target_knn$weights
  
  n_target <- nrow(match_idx)
  null_mean <- numeric(B)
  
  for (b in seq_len(B)) {
    sampled_ref <- vapply(seq_len(n_target), function(i) {
      if (weighted_sampling) {
        sample(match_idx[i, ], size = 1, prob = match_w[i, ])
      } else {
        sample(match_idx[i, ], size = 1)
      }
    }, integer(1))
    
    null_mean[b] <- mean(ref_loo_resid[sampled_ref], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  obs_mean <- mean(target_resid, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  p_one_sided_positive <- (1 + sum(null_mean >= obs_mean)) / (B + 1)
  p_two_sided <- (1 + sum(abs(null_mean) >= abs(obs_mean))) / (B + 1)
  
  return(list(
    obs_mean = obs_mean,
    null_mean = null_mean,
    null_mean_mean = mean(null_mean),
    null_mean_sd = sd(null_mean),
    null_p_one_sided_positive = p_one_sided_positive,
    null_p_two_sided = p_two_sided,
    null_percentile = mean(null_mean <= obs_mean)
  ))
}


###############################################################################
# Main analysis function for one GWAS-method combination
###############################################################################

analyse_one_pgs <- function(
    ref_pgs_dt,
    target_pgs_dt,
    ref_global_pc_dt,
    target_ref_projected_pc_dt,
    target_within_pc_dt,
    gwas,
    method,
    global_pc_cols = paste0("PC", 1:20),
    within_pc_cols = paste0("PC", 1:20),
    k_knn = 50,
    weighting = "inverse_distance",
    B = 5000,
    seed = 1,
    pgs_col = NULL
) {
  message("Analysing: ", gwas, " / ", method)
  
  # Prepare PGS
  ref_pgs <- prep_pgs_dt(ref_pgs_dt, gwas = gwas, method = method, pgs_col = pgs_col)
  target_pgs <- prep_pgs_dt(target_pgs_dt, gwas = gwas, method = method, pgs_col = pgs_col)
  
  # Merge reference PGS with reference-projected/global PCs
  ref_dt <- merge(
    ref_pgs,
    prep_pc_dt(ref_global_pc_dt, global_pc_cols),
    by = c("FID", "IID"),
    all = FALSE
  )
  
  # Merge target PGS with reference-projected/global PCs
  target_refpc_dt <- merge(
    target_pgs,
    prep_pc_dt(target_ref_projected_pc_dt, global_pc_cols),
    by = c("FID", "IID"),
    all = FALSE
  )
  
  # Merge target PGS with within-OpenSNP PCs
  target_withinpc_dt <- merge(
    target_pgs,
    prep_pc_dt(target_within_pc_dt, within_pc_cols),
    by = c("FID", "IID"),
    all = FALSE
  )
  
  if (nrow(ref_dt) == 0) {
    stop("No overlap between reference PGS and reference PCs.")
  }
  
  if (nrow(target_refpc_dt) == 0) {
    stop("No overlap between target PGS and target reference-projected PCs.")
  }
  
  if (nrow(target_withinpc_dt) == 0) {
    stop("No overlap between target PGS and target within-sample PCs.")
  }
  
  # Rename within-OpenSNP PCs BEFORE merging, to avoid collisions
  within_renamed <- paste0("within_", within_pc_cols)
  
  target_withinpc_tmp <- copy(target_withinpc_dt)
  setnames(
    target_withinpc_tmp,
    old = within_pc_cols,
    new = within_renamed
  )
  
  # Keep only target individuals present in both target PC spaces
  target_dt <- merge(
    target_refpc_dt,
    target_withinpc_tmp[, c("FID", "IID", within_renamed), with = FALSE],
    by = c("FID", "IID"),
    all = FALSE
  )
  
  target_dt <- target_dt[
    complete.cases(target_dt[, c("PGS", global_pc_cols, within_renamed), with = FALSE])
  ]  
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Linear correction using global/reference-projected PCs
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  
  linear_fit <- linear_pc_correction(
    ref_dt = ref_dt,
    target_dt = target_dt,
    pc_cols = global_pc_cols
  )
  
  target_dt[, resid_linear := linear_fit$target_resid]
  ref_dt[, resid_linear := linear_fit$ref_resid]
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # KNN correction using same global/reference-projected PC space
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  
  scaled <- scale_pc_matrices(
    ref_dt = ref_dt,
    target_dt = target_dt,
    pc_cols = global_pc_cols
  )
  
  target_knn <- knn_expected_pgs(
    ref_pgs = ref_dt$PGS,
    ref_pc_scaled = scaled$ref,
    target_pc_scaled = scaled$target,
    k = k_knn,
    weighting = weighting
  )
  
  target_dt[, knn_mu := target_knn$mu_hat]
  target_dt[, knn_sd := target_knn$sd_hat]
  target_dt[, resid_knn := PGS - knn_mu]
  target_dt[, z_knn := resid_knn / knn_sd]
  target_dt[, knn_n_eff := target_knn$n_eff]
  target_dt[, knn_mean_dist := target_knn$mean_dist]
  target_dt[, knn_min_dist := target_knn$min_dist]
  
  # Reference leave-one-out KNN residuals
  ref_loo <- reference_leave_one_out_knn_residuals(
    ref_pgs = ref_dt$PGS,
    ref_pc_scaled = scaled$ref,
    k = k_knn,
    weighting = weighting
  )
  
  ref_dt[, knn_mu_loo := ref_loo$mu_hat]
  ref_dt[, resid_knn_loo := ref_loo$resid]
  ref_dt[, z_knn_loo := ref_loo$resid / ref_loo$sd_hat]
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Empirical null based on matched reference pseudo-cohorts
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  
  emp_null <- reference_matched_empirical_null(
    target_knn = target_knn,
    ref_loo_resid = ref_dt$resid_knn_loo,
    target_resid = target_dt$resid_knn,
    B = B,
    weighted_sampling = TRUE,
    seed = seed
  )
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Residual association with PCs
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  
  pc_tests <- rbindlist(list(
    test_residual_pc_association(
      dt = target_dt,
      resid_col = "resid_linear",
      pc_cols = global_pc_cols,
      label = "linear_resid_vs_reference_projected_PCs"
    ),
    test_residual_pc_association(
      dt = target_dt,
      resid_col = "resid_linear",
      pc_cols = within_renamed,
      label = "linear_resid_vs_within_OpenSNP_PCs"
    ),
    test_residual_pc_association(
      dt = target_dt,
      resid_col = "resid_knn",
      pc_cols = global_pc_cols,
      label = "knn_resid_vs_reference_projected_PCs"
    ),
    test_residual_pc_association(
      dt = target_dt,
      resid_col = "resid_knn",
      pc_cols = within_renamed,
      label = "knn_resid_vs_within_OpenSNP_PCs"
    )
  ), fill = TRUE)
  
  pc_tests[, `:=`(
    gwas = gwas,
    method = method
  )]
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Summary
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  
  summary <- data.table(
    gwas = gwas,
    method = method,
    n_ref = nrow(ref_dt),
    n_target = nrow(target_dt),
    
    raw_mean = mean(target_dt$PGS, na.rm = TRUE),
    raw_sd = sd(target_dt$PGS, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    linear_resid_mean = mean(target_dt$resid_linear, na.rm = TRUE),
    linear_resid_sd = sd(target_dt$resid_linear, na.rm = TRUE),
    linear_resid_se = sd(target_dt$resid_linear, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(nrow(target_dt)),
    linear_resid_t = mean(target_dt$resid_linear, na.rm = TRUE) /
      (sd(target_dt$resid_linear, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(nrow(target_dt))),
    linear_resid_p = t.test(target_dt$resid_linear, mu = 0)$p.value,
    
    knn_resid_mean = mean(target_dt$resid_knn, na.rm = TRUE),
    knn_resid_sd = sd(target_dt$resid_knn, na.rm = TRUE),
    knn_resid_se = sd(target_dt$resid_knn, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(nrow(target_dt)),
    knn_resid_t = mean(target_dt$resid_knn, na.rm = TRUE) /
      (sd(target_dt$resid_knn, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(nrow(target_dt))),
    knn_resid_p = t.test(target_dt$resid_knn, mu = 0)$p.value,
    
    knn_z_mean = mean(target_dt$z_knn, na.rm = TRUE),
    knn_z_sd = sd(target_dt$z_knn, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    knn_k = k_knn,
    knn_weighting = weighting,
    knn_mean_n_eff = mean(target_dt$knn_n_eff, na.rm = TRUE),
    knn_median_n_eff = median(target_dt$knn_n_eff, na.rm = TRUE),
    knn_mean_dist = mean(target_dt$knn_mean_dist, na.rm = TRUE),
    knn_median_dist = median(target_dt$knn_mean_dist, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    empirical_null_mean = emp_null$null_mean_mean,
    empirical_null_sd = emp_null$null_mean_sd,
    empirical_null_p_one_sided_positive = emp_null$null_p_one_sided_positive,
    empirical_null_p_two_sided = emp_null$null_p_two_sided,
    empirical_null_percentile = emp_null$null_percentile
  )
  
  return(list(
    summary = summary,
    pc_tests = pc_tests,
    target_results = target_dt,
    ref_results = ref_dt,
    empirical_null = data.table(
      gwas = gwas,
      method = method,
      null_mean = emp_null$null_mean
    ),
    linear_model = linear_fit$fit
  ))
}


###############################################################################
# Wrapper to loop across height GWAS and PGS methods
###############################################################################

run_height_pgs_ancestry_diagnostics <- function(
    ref_pgs_list,
    target_pgs_list,
    ref_sample_name,
    target_sample_name,
    ref_pop = "TRANS",
    target_pop = "TRANS",
    ref_global_pc_dt,
    target_ref_projected_pc_dt,
    target_within_pc_dt,
    gwas_vec = c("Yengo_height", "UKB_height", "Howe_sibling_height"),
    pgs_methods = c("ptclump", "quickprs"),
    global_pc_cols = paste0("PC", 1:20),
    within_pc_cols = paste0("PC", 1:20),
    k_knn = 50,
    weighting = "inverse_distance",
    B = 5000,
    seed = 1,
    pgs_col = NULL
) {
  results <- list()
  summary_list <- list()
  pc_test_list <- list()
  null_list <- list()
  
  for (gwas_i in gwas_vec) {
    for (method_i in pgs_methods) {
      if (is.null(target_pgs_list[[target_sample_name]])) {
        warning("Target sample not found in target_pgs_list: ", target_sample_name)
        next
      }
      if (is.null(target_pgs_list[[target_sample_name]][[target_pop]])) {
        warning("Target pop not found: ", target_pop)
        next
      }
      if (is.null(ref_pgs_list[[gwas_i]])) {
        warning("Reference GWAS not found: ", gwas_i)
        next
      }
      if (is.null(target_pgs_list[[target_sample_name]][[target_pop]][[gwas_i]])) {
        warning("Target GWAS not found: ", gwas_i)
        next
      }
      if (is.null(ref_pgs_list[[gwas_i]][[method_i]])) {
        warning("Reference method not found: ", gwas_i, " / ", method_i)
        next
      }
      if (is.null(target_pgs_list[[target_sample_name]][[target_pop]][[gwas_i]][[method_i]])) {
        warning("Target method not found: ", gwas_i, " / ", method_i)
        next
      }
      
      res_i <- analyse_one_pgs(
        ref_pgs_dt = ref_pgs_list[[gwas_i]][[method_i]],
        target_pgs_dt = target_pgs_list[[target_sample_name]][[target_pop]][[gwas_i]][[method_i]],
        ref_global_pc_dt = ref_global_pc_dt,
        target_ref_projected_pc_dt = target_ref_projected_pc_dt,
        target_within_pc_dt = target_within_pc_dt,
        gwas = gwas_i,
        method = method_i,
        global_pc_cols = global_pc_cols,
        within_pc_cols = within_pc_cols,
        k_knn = k_knn,
        weighting = weighting,
        B = B,
        seed = seed,
        pgs_col = pgs_col
      )
      
      key_i <- paste(gwas_i, method_i, sep = "__")
      results[[key_i]] <- res_i
      summary_list[[key_i]] <- res_i$summary
      pc_test_list[[key_i]] <- res_i$pc_tests
      null_list[[key_i]] <- res_i$empirical_null
    }
  }
  
  summary_dt <- rbindlist(summary_list, fill = TRUE)
  pc_tests_dt <- rbindlist(pc_test_list, fill = TRUE)
  empirical_null_dt <- rbindlist(null_list, fill = TRUE)
  
  return(list(
    summary = summary_dt,
    pc_tests = pc_tests_dt,
    empirical_null = empirical_null_dt,
    full_results = results
  ))
}

```

## Run code

```{r}

# Target OpenSNP PGS
target_pgs <- read_pgs(
  config = config,
  name = "opensnp",
  pgs_methods = c("quickprs"),
  pop = "TRANS"
)

# Target PCs
target_ref_projected_pc_dt <- fread('~/oliverpainfel/Data/OpenSNP/GenoPred/zenodo_10715132.20_ref_pcs/opensnp/pcs/projected/TRANS/opensnp-TRANS.profiles')

target_within_pc_dt<- fread('~/oliverpainfel/Data/OpenSNP/GenoPred/zenodo_10715132.20_ref_pcs/opensnp/pcs/within_sample/opensnp.outlier_detection.EUR.PCs.txt')

# Reference PGS
ref_pgs <- read_reference_pgs(config = config, population = 'TRANS')

ref_global_pc_dt <- fread('~/oliverpainfel/Data/OpenSNP/GenoPred/zenodo_10715132.20_ref_pcs/reference/pc_score_files/TRANS/ref-TRANS-pcs.profiles')

res <- run_height_pgs_ancestry_diagnostics(
  ref_pgs_list = ref_pgs,
  target_pgs_list = target_pgs,
  target_sample_name = "opensnp",
  ref_pop = "TRANS",
  target_pop = "TRANS",
  ref_global_pc_dt = ref_global_pc_dt,
  target_ref_projected_pc_dt = target_ref_projected_pc_dt,
  target_within_pc_dt = target_within_pc_dt,
  gwas_vec = gwas_list$name,
  pgs_methods = c("quickprs"),
  global_pc_cols = paste0("PC", 1:40),
  within_pc_cols = paste0("PC", 1:10),
  k_knn = 50,
  weighting = "inverse_distance",
  B = 100,
  seed = 1
)

res$summary
res$pc_tests
```
